who: property management CFOs processing 5–15 expense reports/month
offer: For property management CFOs processing 5–15 expense reports/month, inaccurate expense reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate expense report compilation instead of manual compilation of expense reports from credit card statements.
problem: Inaccurate expense reporting leads to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property management CFOs
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on expense reporting
DM outreach to CFOs with demo videos
Participate in forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of transactions on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing records
